chunks.text: Peak Load Estimation with the Generalized Extreme Value Distribution (EECS-2022-60) by Jonathan Lee, Mohini Bariya and Duncan Callaway. This technical report explores methods for estimating peak electrical loads using statistical extreme value theory, which is crucial for grid reliability and infrastructure planning.

Circuits and Control for High-Performance Grid-tied Ac-Dc Conversion Systems (EECS-2022-22) by Zitao Liao, Robert Pilawa-Podgurski, Seth R. Sanders, Duncan Callaway and Minjie Chen. This report focuses on advanced power electronics designs for efficient AC-DC conversion in grid-connected applications, addressing challenges in renewable energy integration.

Energy-Efficient System Design Through Adaptive Voltage Scaling (EECS-2019-146) by Ben Keller. This technical report investigates adaptive voltage scaling techniques to optimize energy consumption in electronic systems, contributing to power management and sustainability in computing hardware.

An Integrated Multilevel Converter with Sigma Delta Control for LED Lighting (EECS-2017-73) by Daniel Gerber. This report presents a specialized converter design with sigma-delta modulation control for LED lighting applications, enhancing performance and efficiency in illumination systems.
